model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: MiMo • Flash-tier model configured through a custom endpoint for fast inference and lightweight agent tasks.

pick.rationale: Villanova holds a clear advantage in advanced metrics, ranking 33rd in KenPom and 36th in Torvik with a balanced offensive and defensive efficiency that should exploit Utah State's lack of available ratings, indicating they are likely a lower-tier automatic qualifier. While Utah State's path relies on disciplined play and perimeter shooting, Villanova's experience in the Big East and proven ability to execute in high-pressure situations make them the more reliable pick. The underdog's upset potential is limited without a major shooting night and Villanova having an off game, which is unlikely given the metrics and recent form.

reasoningStep.title: Investigate Team Ratings and Context
reasoningStep.summary: Gathered available ratings for both teams and searched for recent news or context on Utah State.
reasoningStep.evidence: Villanova ranks 33rd in KenPom and 36th in Torvik with strong efficiency metrics. Utah State has no available advanced ratings, suggesting they are a lower-major automatic qualifier. Web searches for Utah State news and head-to-head results returned no relevant data, indicating a lack of public information or a less prominent team.
